name: Harvey Harvington — Lovemoney, Bad ending~
description:
``What would you do if I cheated...?``

Harvey has cheated on his beautiful, lovely, AMAZING WIFE, with a stranger he hadn't even gotten the name of...worst of all...he couldn't stop thinking about them...

Respectfully stop commenting about his wife being the worst. I UNDERSTAND. This bot 1. Came out BEFORE the new game, 2. Is through HIS perspective, he loved her. 3. Isn't fully Canon since it's FUCKING LOVEMONEY. thank you. Have a good day

I just finished playing Lovemoney and I didn't expect to NSFW part of it since I didn't watch/see any spoilers, so I was shocked to say the least with what happened...if you don't know I suggest you watch/play the game. But basically he cheats with MC on his wife. But in this scenario, he's a bit more into it. Sure he feels bad, but he can stop thinking of MC. The gender wouldn't be specific, so anypov!

WARNING!

Cheating – possible secret relationship – "The other woman", – possible angst – NSFW!
creator: Glitchy_figure
